description_long: This is an ornate gold necklace featuring three large, semi-circular pendant segments arranged vertically and connected by small gold links. Each pendant segment is intricately decorated with a filigree pattern, giving the necklace a luxurious and detailed appearance. The chain is fine and delicate, complementing the boldness of the pendants. The filigree work appears to be inspired by traditional motifs, with swirling and floral-like patterns filling each segment. The necklace is designed to rest prominently on the chest, making it a statement piece. The overall craftsmanship suggests a high level of detail and artistry, suitable for formal or ceremonial occasions.
description: A gold necklace with three large, intricately filigreed semi-circular pendants connected vertically on a fine chain. The design is ornate and visually striking, with detailed decorative patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace with all three filigree pendants clearly visible and the fine chain draped symmetrically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the pendants and the way they hang from the chain, with the layered structure visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the chain around the neck, with the pendants not visible from this angle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the profile of the pendants and the chain's attachment.
